active_tasks.title: Native STT/TS for all swarm agents
active_tasks.description: Build and integrate native speech-to-text and text-to-text capabilities for all swarm agents (OWL/Hermes, Antigravity, Chat Node, Xbox Hermes). Each agent should be able to transcribe audio and synthesize speech natively.
deliverables: OWL: hermes_voice_chat.py with VAD + streaming STT/TTS (done at /home/jimmy/hermes_voice_chat.py)
Antigravity: Review chat_agent.py key loading fix and create collaboration workspace

progress_log.action: Fixed hermes_voice_chat.py: (1) Added ALSA stderr suppression via _run_silent() helper and contextlib.redirect_stderr during PyAudio init. (2) Fixed streaming LLM parser — Gemini streamGenerateContent returns JSON array [{...}] not SSE data: lines, added buffer-based JSON array parsing with SSE fallback. (3) Improved STT empty response handling — now treats [no speech], (silence), none, n/a, etc. as empty. (4) Added error handling for LLM HTTP errors with raise_for_status(). Verified streaming LLM works end-to-end with API key.
